pr.title: WIP - added many functions in stage.c as comments that are matching on decomp.me
pr.author: snuffysasa

summary: WIP stage decomp scratch PR that added temporary structs, variable-label renames, S32Vec typing, and many commented-out C reconstructions for stage.c functions said to match on decomp.me. It was closed unmerged by the author to send a new PR, so its main value is as a record of exploratory matching work and temporary naming/type hypotheses rather than landed source.

key_files.role: Main WIP area; added temporary structs, externs, one adjusted asm signature, and large commented C attempts for stage functions.
Updated temporary symbol names for stage-related globals in assembly references and data labels.
Updated commented extern label references to match the new temporary names.
Added S32Vec and S32VecPtr typedefs parallel to existing S16Vec.

what_changed: Added temporary stage helper structs in stage.c: StructPairWithStageID with stage_id and regular_number fields, and StructNumberAndVecp with number and S32Vec* vec fields.
Added S32Vec and S32VecPtr to include/dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h as a three-s32 vector type.

Renamed several anonymous labels to temporary descriptive names, including lbl_803B84C8 to unk_Vec_803B84C8, lbl_803E9960 to unk_arr_of_vectors_803B84C8 in assembly, and lbl_804D49E8/lbl_804D49F0 to unk_struct_804D49E8/unk_struct_804D49F0.
Updated references in stage assembly and variables.h comments to use the new temporary names.
Changed stage.c references from lbl_803B84C8 to unk_Vec_803B84C8 in func_80224CAC.

Added several extern declarations for stage-related constants, globals, and unknown functions such as func_80051EC8, func_801C2D24, func_801C0754, func_801C0800, func_801C0F78, func_801C0FB8, and func_801C1074.
Adjusted func_80224E38's asm wrapper signature from generic s32 arguments to Vec* arg0 and s32 arg1, with a comment noting the equivalent C matched 100% on decomp.me but not in the repo.

Inserted large commented-out C reconstructions for functions including func_80224E64, func_80224FDC, func_80225194, func_8022519C, func_802251B4, func_802251E8, func_8022524C, func_80225298, and later stage functions in the same range.
smart_moves: Kept uncertain reconstructions as comments rather than replacing asm wholesale, preserving build safety while documenting matching hypotheses.

Introduced explicit temporary struct shapes to make repeated data movement patterns easier to reason about, especially the pair of stage_id and regular_number copied to local stack structs before calls.

Used descriptive temporary symbol prefixes such as unk_struct, unk_arr_of_vectors, and unk_Vec instead of leaving all globals as raw lbl_* labels, improving searchability without overstating final names.
Recognized that a 12-byte data element indexed by arg0 looked vector-like and added S32Vec typing to express the observed x/y/z s32 layout.

Documented a decomp.me/local mismatch for func_80224E38, which is useful evidence that matching in an isolated scratch may still depend on local headers, prototypes, compiler context, or surrounding repo state.
decomp_lessons: Do not treat decomp.me matches as automatically ready to land; local project context can still fail to match even when a small C snippet is reported as 100% matching externally.
Temporary names are useful when they encode observed structure, but they should remain clearly provisional with unk_ prefixes until semantics are confirmed.
For 12-byte indexed tables, try vector-like typedefs such as S32Vec only when the assembly shows consistent 0x0c strides and x/y/z-style field access; keep the uncertainty documented.

When reconstructing functions around small-data globals, matching often depends on the exact global symbol, type, and SDA access pattern, so variable declarations and assembly labels must be kept synchronized.
Large commented decomp attempts can help transfer knowledge to a follow-up PR, but they are not a substitute for landed, compiled, matching C.

naming_conventions.evidence: lbl_803B84C8 was renamed to unk_Vec_803B84C8 for a 12-byte Vec-like rodata object.
A table formerly labelled lbl_803E9960 was renamed to unk_arr_of_vectors_803B84C8/unk_arr_of_vectors_803E9960 in different parts of the slice; this inconsistency itself signals WIP naming.
Small-data labels lbl_804D49E8 and lbl_804D49F0 became unk_struct_804D49E8 and unk_struct_804D49F0.

naming_conventions.pattern: Temporary C struct names in PascalCase-like form
naming_conventions.evidence: StructPairWithStageID and StructNumberAndVecp were introduced as temporary unknown structs in stage.c.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched global label renames in asm/melee/gr/stage.s with variables.h comment updates to keep symbol references coherent.
Used comments beside asm wrappers to preserve C candidates that may match in isolation while keeping the original inline assembly active.

Inferred struct fields from stores and loads around SDA globals: unk_struct_804D49E8 appears to hold a number and a pointer to an indexed vector table; local_data copies from unk_struct_804D49F0 and then overwrites stage_id and regular_number before calling stage subsystem functions.
For func_80224E38, the candidate C was a one-line wrapper calling func_801C2D24(arg1 + 4, arg0), and the active asm signature was changed to Vec* arg0, s32 arg1 to reflect that hypothesis.
For random-position or stage-start functions such as func_80224FDC, the commented C shows attempts to express loops around HSD_Randi and func_801C2D24, but these were not landed as active code.

review_feedback.text: closing this one to send a new one
review_feedback.impact: PR was closed unmerged; likely superseded by a later submission.

review_feedback.text: added some temp structs and added some temporary labels for data
review_feedback.impact: Confirms that names and types were explicitly provisional.

review_feedback.text: No review comments or formal review feedback were present in the provided slice.
review_feedback.impact: No reviewer guidance can be inferred.

follow_up_queries: Find the newer PR that replaced or superseded PR #224 after the author closed it.
Search current stage.c for func_80224E38 and func_80224E64 to see whether these commented decomp.me candidates later landed.
Verify whether S32Vec remained in mtxtypes.h or was renamed/replaced by a project-specific vector type.
Audit uses of unk_struct_804D49E8 and unk_struct_804D49F0 to determine final semantic names for the stage selection/state structs.
Resolve the inconsistent temporary array name evidence: unk_arr_of_vectors_803B84C8 in asm diff versus unk_arr_of_vectors_803E9960 in stage.c declarations.
